_meta.note: Pahadi catalog. Audio/artwork on Cloudflare R2 (no bundled MP3s).

artists.name: Pahadi Folk
artists.bio: A collection of traditional Pahadi folk recordings spanning the Himalayan regions — Garhwali, Kumaoni, Jaunsari and Himachali.

artists.name: Sardar Singh Sharma
artists.bio: Sardar Singh Sharma — Jaunsari Pahadi artist (imported catalog).

artists.name: Lalit Mohan Joshi
artists.bio: Lalit Mohan Joshi — Kumaoni Pahadi artist (imported catalog).

artists.name: Sanjay Sharma
artists.bio: Sanjay Sharma — Himachali Pahadi artist (imported catalog).

artists.name: Palak, Hardik
artists.bio: Palak, Hardik — Himachali Pahadi artist (imported catalog).

artists.name: Diksha Dhaundiyal, Pooja Dhaundiyal
artists.bio: Diksha Dhaundiyal, Pooja Dhaundiyal — Kumaoni Pahadi artist (imported catalog).

artists.name: Zorawar Hunk
artists.bio: Zorawar Hunk — Himachali Pahadi artist (imported catalog).

artists.name: Rohit Chauhan
artists.bio: Rohit Chauhan — Garhwali Pahadi artist (imported catalog).

artists.name: Thakur Dass Rathi
artists.bio: Thakur Dass Rathi — Himachali Pahadi artist (imported catalog).

artists.name: Jitendra Tomkyal
artists.bio: Jitendra Tomkyal — Kumaoni Pahadi artist (imported catalog).

artists.name: Surinder Sharma
artists.bio: Surinder Sharma — Himachali Pahadi artist (imported catalog).

albums.title: Pahadi Folk Collection
albums.description: A curated collection of traditional Pahadi folk songs.
albums.attribution: Traditional Pahadi folk recording. Audio streamed from Cloudflare R2.
